_comment: TITAN AMSI Monitor v2.0.1 — Configuration File

filter._comment_severity: Minimum severity to log: NONE | INFO | LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH | CRITICAL
filter._comment_dedup: Log DEDUP reference lines (tiny, ~20 bytes each). Set false to save disk space.
filter._comment_langs: Capture scripts from ALL languages (PS, JS, VBS, Python, Batch, etc). False = AMSI-native only.
filter._comment_clean: Also log scripts with no detected threat (SEV_INFO). Useful for training data.
filter._comment_content: Max bytes of decoded script content to store in JSON (truncated above this). Default 8192.
filter._comment_pid_whitelist: These PIDs are always logged regardless of severity (e.g. your own analysis tools).
filter._comment_proc_blacklist: Process names to NEVER log (e.g. known-safe internal tools). Case-insensitive substring match.
